mc.util.expr

Class Expression

  • java.lang.Object
    • mc.util.expr.Expression

  • public class Expression
extends java.lang.Object
    A class that is able to simplify expressions using Z3

    • Method Detail

      • combineGuards

        public static Guard combineGuards(Guard first,
                                  Guard second,
                                  com.microsoft.z3.Context ctx)
                           throws CompilationException,
                                  java.lang.InterruptedException
        Combine two guards together
        Parameters:
        first - The first guard
        second - The second guard
        Returns:
        A logical and of both guards, with the next variables substituted from the first into the second.
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException
